Size Unwind in comfort with our canvas pillow, expertly sized to provide an ideal balance of support and coziness. Width : 40cm Height : 40cm Hidden Zip Experience seamless aesthetics and easy customization with our canvas pillow featuring a hidden zip, allowing for hassle-free insertion and removal of the pillow cover. Canvas Material Indulge in luxurious comfort with our canvas material pillow, crafted to offer a cozy and stylish addition to your home decor. High Quality Print Elevate your home decor with our high-quality print canvas pillow, showcasing vibrant and detailed designs that bring life and artistry to any space. 100% Polyester Filling Plush and durable, our canvas pillow boasts a 100% polyester filling for ultimate comfort. Hand Washable Enjoy effortless maintenance with our hand washable canvas pillow, combining practicality and style in one. Can I personalize the canvas pillow with my own photo or design? Absolutely! Our canvas pillows are fully customizable, allowing you to add your own photos, designs, or personalized text for a unique touch. What type of material is used for the canvas pillow? Our canvas pillows are made with high-quality canvas fabric that offers a perfect blend of durability and softness, ensuring both comfort and long-lasting use. Is the pillow filling included with the canvas pillow? Yes, the canvas pillows come with a premium 100% polyester filling included, providing a plush and cozy feel. Can I hand wash the canvas pillow? Absolutely! Our canvas pillows are hand washable, allowing for easy cleaning and maintenance. Simply follow the care instructions provided, gently hand wash the pillow cover, and air dry it to maintain its quality and design. Can I preview my personalized design before placing the order? Yes, we provide a preview feature on our website where you can see how your personalized design will look on the canvas pillow before finalizing your order.
